verdict: A playable and well-timed chart that is severely held back by extreme pattern repetition and copy-pasting in the second half.

issues.problem: The 4-step sequence (JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L) is heavily copy-pasted and repeated over 10 times. This makes the climax of the chart feel monotonous and uninspired.
The sequence 'D -> L -> JUMP LR' at 140 BPM eighth notes forces an awkward double-step on the left foot, which feels uncomfortable when repeated constantly.
